name: Ayoconnect Brick
description: Hong Kong-based open banking API aggregator — account linking, balances, and data across APAC banks.

seo.title: Ayoconnect Brick — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Ayoconnect Brick: Hong Kong-based open banking API aggregator — account linking, balances, and data across APAC banks.

when_to_use: Open banking aggregation across APAC banks and institutions
Account balance and transaction data for APAC fintech apps
Financial data normalization across diverse APAC banking APIs
Enabling personal finance apps in Hong Kong and SEA markets
Bank account linking for credit scoring in Asian markets

pros: APAC bank coverage Western aggregators lack
Hong Kong regulatory grounding useful for region
Account linking and balance data standardized
Focus on financial wellness use cases
cons: Name collision with Ayoconnect Brick confusing
Smaller than Moneytree in Japan market
review.verdict: Decent APAC open banking aggregator, but market still has clearer regional leaders per country.
review.best_for: Fintechs needing cross-APAC account aggregation in one contract
review.not_for: Teams focused on a single Asian market with a dominant local player

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
